ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mountains" (
  "mountain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mountain */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the mountain */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the mountain */,
  "range" TEXT /* Mountain range */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation in feet */,
  "distance_from_user" REAL /* Distance from the user's current location */,
  "bearing" TEXT /* Bearing from the user's current location */,
  "prominence" INTEGER /* Prominence in feet */,
  "radius_search" TEXT /* Radius search feature */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* General difficulty level of climbing the mountain */,
  "recommended_equipment" TEXT /* Recommended equipment for climbing the mountain */,
  "nearest_town" TEXT /* Nearest town for logistics and support */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station for real-time weather updates */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey or inspection of the mountain */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for an image of the mountain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mountain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., climber, guide, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* User's experience level (e.g., beginner, intermediate, expert) */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* User's emergency contact information */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* User's preferred language */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL for the user's profile image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climbing_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climbing record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who climbed the mountain */,
  "mountain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mountain climbed */,
  "date_climbed" TEXT /* Date when the mountain was climbed */,
  "time_taken" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the climb */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the climb */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the climb */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the climb */,
  "companions" TEXT /* List of companions who joined the climb */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* List of equipment used during the climb */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the climb experience (1-5) */,
  "photos" TEXT /* URLs for photos taken during the climb */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL for a video of the climb */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climbing_records_mountain_id FOREIGN KEY ("mountain_id") REFERENCES mountains ("mountain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climbing_records_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment (e.g., climbing gear, tent) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the equipment */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Availability status of the equipment */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the equipment */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the equipment */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer_url" TEXT /* URL for the manufacturer's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user renting the equipment */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment rented */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was rented */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment is due for return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the rental (e.g., active, returned) */,
  "rental_cost" REAL /* Cost of the rental */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Late fees if applicable */,
  "return_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the equipment when returned */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* User feedback on the rental experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_rentals_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_rentals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
